topNegativeDrivers.reason: Your sensitive skin combined with multiple potentially irritating actives increases irritation risk. This is personalized for your sensitive skin profile.

Alcohol Denat can be drying and may worsen irritation for sensitive or compromised skin barriers. Your eczema condition makes barrier disruption more likely.
Fragrance is a common sensitizer/irritant and may trigger redness or stinging. Your eczema condition makes barrier disruption more likely.
You prefer fragrance-free products, but this product contains fragrance.

patchTest: Patch test: apply a small amount on inner arm, leave for 24 hours, and check for redness/itching/burning.
usage: Start with 1-2 uses per week. Increase slowly only if there is no irritation.
avoidIf: Avoid applying on broken/irritated skin. Stop immediately if burning persists.
